case_title: D'SILVA, LINO J.M. et al VS DISNEY, EUGENE MR. DBA DISNEY & CO. REALTY

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF D'SILVA, LINO J.M. HEARING SET FOR JUL-21-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF D'SILVA, LINO J.M. D'SILVA, NINFA M. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DISNEY, EUGENE MR.  DBA DISNEY & CO. REALTY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO EUGENE DISNEY RETURNED SIGNED.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUL-21-1993, GRANTED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,398.05 FILED BY D'SILVA, LINO J.M. D'SILVA, NINFA M. AS TO DEFENDANT DISNEY, EUGENE MR.  DBA DISNEY & CO. REALTY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-24-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DISNEY, EUGENE MR.  DBA DISNEY & CO. REALTY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
